headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting CenterPoint Energy Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: CenterPoint Energy has underperformed the broader market over the past year, yet Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
